features: 💅【Colorful Floral Nail Files Nail】：You will receive 36pcs mini nail files,These colorful straight nail files emery board can easily help to trim and shape the nail with your desired shape or length.Sufficient quantity to meet your daily use and replacement needs, you can share it as a gift with friends and family.

💅【Excellent quality】The double sided nail file is made of high-quality sandpaper and EVA material, odorless and harmless, not easy to fade, deform or break, and safe, providing you with a comfortable nail trimming experience.professional nail file is excellent nail accessories.

💅【Exquisite pattern】: Our emery boards for nails is printed with various colorful patterns, such as flowers, leopard prints, waves, butterflies, lip prints, rainbows, etc., which look cute and exquisite. You can choose different styles according to your different mood. A lightweight colorful nail file is both simple and convenient to use. You can use a nail file to quickly trim or shape acrylic nails of the shape or length you want.

💅 【 Best Gift 】 Nail buffer files are suitable for handling most types of nails (natural nails, acrylic nails, and fake nails). Colored nail files can be used not only in beauty salons, therapy centers, and homes, but also as a great gift for girls who love nail art. You can give it as a Valentine's Day gift, birthday gift, or Christmas gift. A professional mini nail files is an ideal choice for both home and travel.
